topStories.title: Airfares on US airlines have shot up due to the war with Iran, as jet fuel costs rise, but travel demand remains strong
topStories.description: The US and Israel’s war in Iran has pushed airlines to raise fares amid soaring jet fuel costs and airspace disruptions. Despite higher prices, travel demand remains strong, with rising ticket values and multiple record sales days reported by major US carriers.

topStories.title: Received consular access plea for an American and six Ukrainian nationals: MEA
topStories.description: Ministry of External Affairs says the Ukrainians and an American were found “wanting” of the required permits for visiting Mizoram

topStories.title: Trump references Pearl Harbor during meeting with Japanese PM on Iran war
topStories.description: US president said that Japan was 'stepping up to the plate' to support the US war without offering details.

topStories.title: Supreme privilege to touch the sacred dust of Ayodhya, says President Murmu
topStories.description: Embracing the principles of Ram Rajya, we can construct a nation grounded in morality and ethical conduct, the President says

topStories.title: HDFC Bank ADRs crash another 4% after sharp selloff, hinting at more losses on Friday
topStories.description: HDFC Bank's US-listed shares dipped further following the former chairman's sudden resignation, citing ethical concerns. Despite management's reassurances and a lack of specific details, investors remain cautious. Analysts, however, see the stock correction as a potential buying opportunity, emphasizing the bank's strong fundamentals and leadership continuity over perceived tactical differences.

topStories.title: Trump meets Japan PM Sanae Takaichi at White House amid US-Iran war, Hormuz Strait crisis: What's on agenda?
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump welcomed Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi to the White House on Thursday for a summit. Takaichi's visit comes amid tensions in the Middle East after the US and Israel launched a war with Iran. Here's what's expected from the meeting.

topStories.title: Chhattisgarh Assembly passes new anti-conversion Bill with stricter provisions
topStories.description: The Bill mandates life imprisonment and fines up to ₹25 lakh in specific cases; Congress MLAs raise objections, call for broader consultations, and seek the handing over of the Bill to a ‘Select Committee’

topStories.description: Israeli officials contradict Trump say US knew of Iran gas strike

dailyNews.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: CPI (M) unrelenting in demand for six seats, stalemate in talks with DMK continues
dailyNews.description: The DMK’s argument is that it cannot part with more seats as it has accommodated additional parties in the alliance and has already given three more seats to the Congress.

dailyNews.title: Qatar PM on Iran attacks: ‘Wisdom seems to be lacking these days’
dailyNews.description: Qatar’s prime minister has said Iran’s claims that it is targeting US bases is “unacceptable and unjustified”.

dailyNews.title: US' TikTok-Style Iran War Clips Spark Backlash For Trivialising Conflict
dailyNews.description: Across its social media platforms, the administration has pushed out high-energy clips that cut between actual explosions in Iran and footage of action heroes, gaming sequences, and even hard-hitting...

dailyNews.title: Former counter-terrorism head investigated by FBI over alleged leaks
dailyNews.description: The former counter-terrorism head resigned on Tuesday over the war with Iran, saying the country posed "no imminent threat" to the US.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth drops blunt line: ‘It takes money to kill bad guys’ amid Pentagon seeking $200 billion more for Iran war effort
dailyNews.description: As the Trump administration weighs its military and diplomatic options, lawmakers are making clear that any funding approval will require detailed justification, strategic clarity, and sustained engagement with Congress.

dailyNews.title: Assam Assembly elections 2026: Pradyut factor in Congress’s third list of candidates
dailyNews.description: MLA Basanta Das, denied a ticket by the BJP, gets an Asom Gana Parishad ticket nine hours after switching over

dailyNews.title: Trump hails Operation Epic Fury: ‘Did what no president had the courage to do’
dailyNews.description: Trump said Iran’s navy, air force and leadership have been “gone,” adding that US forces face virtually no opposition.

dailyNews.title: Japan PM to hold 'difficult' talks with Trump as Iran conflict looms large
dailyNews.description: It comes days after Trump criticised Japan for not answering his demands for help in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Senegal instruct lawyers, while CAF’s Motsepe defends Morocco’s AFCON award
dailyNews.description: Senegal football calls in lawyers as CAS awaits, while CAF president defends decision to hand AFCON title to Morocco.

dailyNews.title: California, New York and 6 other states sue to block $6.2 bn Nexstar-Tegna deal: Why Trump-backed merger faces trouble
dailyNews.description: California, New York and six other US states filed a lawsuit on Wednesday, seeking to block the proposed $6.2 billion deal between Nexstar and rival Tegna. US President Donald Trump has voiced support for the deal. Here's all you need to know.

dailyNews.title: Congress 3rd list for Assam includes MLA opposed by Pradyut Bordoloi
dailyNews.description: Among the 22 names in Thursday’s list was sitting legislator Asif Mohamad Nazar, who has been again fielded from the Laharighat seat.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth insists US is meeting Iran war objectives
dailyNews.description: US Defense Secretary insisted Washington is meeting its objectives against Iran despite escalating attacks on Gulf.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth says no ‘timeframe’ for war on Iran as Pentagon asks for $200bn
dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth hints war funding may change, leaving timeline decisions to President Trump.

dailyNews.title: “It’s time to end the war.” UN’s Guterres urges US, Israel to cease attacks
dailyNews.description: UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres warned the US and Israel of “potential tragic consequences” from the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: US-Iran war: Pilots' body urges flight crews to stay vigilant in West Asia air spaces, flags ‘increased risk’
dailyNews.description: The association recommended that pilots thoroughly evaluate all mission briefings, NOTAMS, and internal corporate guidelines before departure.

dailyNews.title: Trump quips about Pearl Harbor when asked if Japan given advanced notice on Iran attacks: 'Wanted surprise'
dailyNews.description: During White House meeting with Japan PM Sanae Takaichi, President Donald Trump quips about Pearl Harbor while speaking about the launch of Operation Epic Fury.

dailyNews.title: Judge orders Trump administration to restore Voice of America's operations
dailyNews.description: A federal judge has ordered the Trump administration to restore the government-run Voice of America to full operations, putting hundreds of journalists who have been on administrative leave for a year back to work.

dailyNews.title: Ex-FBI agents who worked on Trump 2020 election probe sue over firings
dailyNews.description: Two former FBI agents who helped investigate President Trump's efforts to overturn the 2020 presidential election results sued the federal government, alleging they were wrongfully terminated.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon Seeks Additional $200 Billion to Fund Iran War
dailyNews.description: The request, which the White House has not yet submitted to Congress, is already encountering some resistance.

dailyNews.title: Trump Jokes About Pearl Harbor in Meeting With Japan’s Leader
dailyNews.description: Breaking a taboo, President Trump needled Japan’s prime minister about the World War II attack, as she widened her eyes and appeared to take a deep breath in the Oval Office.

dailyNews.title: Lawsuit Accuses Justice Dept. Leadership of ‘Political Retribution’
dailyNews.description: The suit filed by two fired F.B.I. agents aimed to hold the Trump administration accountable for the purge of personnel who had worked on the investigations of Mr. Trump or his allies.

dailyNews.title: A Gift From Trump to the Supreme Court
dailyNews.description: In a caustic critique of the court issued on social media late Sunday night, the president inadvertently buttressed its independence.

dailyNews.title: Can Military Excellence Save Us From Trump’s Incompetence?
dailyNews.description: It should never have come to this.

dailyNews.title: Trump makes Pearl Harbor joke during meeting with Japanese prime minister
dailyNews.description: Trump invoked Japan's December 1941 attack on Pearl Harbor when speaking about recent U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran during a meeting with Japan's prime minister.

dailyNews.title: Trump makes a Pearl Harbor joke while meeting with the Japanese prime minister
dailyNews.description: When asked by a reporter about why the U.S. didn't share their Iran war plans with Japan, President Donald Trump said it was necessary for the element of surprise. The president followed this with a joke, saying, "Who knows better about surprise than Japan? Ok, why didn’t you tell me about Pearl Harbor?"

dailyNews.title: Gabbard says Trump's objectives in Iran differ from the Israeli government
dailyNews.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard told Rep. Joaquin Castro, D-Texas, that President Trump's objectives in Iran differ from those of the Israeli government.

dailyNews.title: Some DHS contractors told White House officials they were asked to pay Lewandowski
dailyNews.description: Some contractors working with the Department of Homeland Security have told the Trump administration that they had been asked to pay Corey Lewandowski, a close ally of the president. NBC News' Julia Ainsley has details on Lewandowski's influence over the contracting process as an unpaid "special government employee."
